---
title: "Transcriptomic Analysis of Breast Cancer (Basal vs Normal)"
format: html
execute:
  echo: true
  warning: false
  message: false
---

```{r}
library(GEOquery)
library(tidyverse)
library(limma)
library(EnhancedVolcano)
library(pheatmap)
library(patchwork)
library(clusterProfiler)
library(org.Hs.eg.db)
library(enrichplot)
library(grid)

gse <- getGEO("GSE45827", GSEMatrix = TRUE)
breast <- gse[[1]]
expr <- exprs(breast)
metadata <- pData(breast)
genes <- fData(breast)

group <- ifelse(grepl("^Basal", metadata$title), "Basal",
         ifelse(grepl("^Normal", metadata$title), "Normal", NA))

keep <- !is.na(group)

expr2 <- expr[, keep]
group2 <- factor(group[keep])

expr_t <- t(expr2)

pca <- prcomp(expr_t, scale. = TRUE)

pca_df <- data.frame(
  PC1 = pca$x[,1],
  PC2 = pca$x[,2],
  Group = group2
)

pca_plot <- ggplot(pca_df, aes(PC1, PC2, color = Group)) +
  geom_point(size = 3) +
  theme_classic() +
  scale_color_manual(values = c(Basal = "#C0392B", Normal = "#2980B9")) +
  labs(title = "PCA")

design <- model.matrix(~0 + group2)
colnames(design) <- levels(group2)

fit <- lmFit(expr2, design)

contrast.matrix <- makeContrasts(Basal - Normal, levels = design)

fit2 <- contrasts.fit(fit, contrast.matrix)
fit2 <- eBayes(fit2)

results <- topTable(fit2, number = Inf, adjust.method = "BH")

volcano_plot <- EnhancedVolcano(
  results,
  lab = rownames(results),
  x = "logFC",
  y = "adj.P.Val",
  pCutoff = 0.05,
  FCcutoff = 1,
  title = "Volcano Plot"
)

top50 <- head(results[order(results$adj.P.Val), ], 50)
topGenes <- rownames(top50)

heatmap_data <- expr2[topGenes, ]
heatmap_scaled <- t(scale(t(heatmap_data)))

annotation <- data.frame(Group = group2)
rownames(annotation) <- colnames(heatmap_scaled)

ann_colors <- list(
  Group = c(Basal = "#C0392B", Normal = "#2980B9")
)

heatmap_plot <- pheatmap(
  heatmap_scaled,
  annotation_col = annotation,
  annotation_colors = ann_colors,
  show_rownames = FALSE,
  silent = TRUE
)

heatmap_panel <- wrap_elements(full = heatmap_plot$gtable)

gene_annot <- genes[, c("ID", "Gene Symbol", "ENTREZ_GENE_ID")]
colnames(gene_annot) <- c("ProbeID", "Symbol", "ENTREZID")

results$ProbeID <- rownames(results)

results_annotated <- merge(results, gene_annot, by = "ProbeID")

sig_entrez <- unique(results_annotated$ENTREZID[
  results_annotated$adj.P.Val < 0.05 &
  abs(results_annotated$logFC) > 1
])

sig_entrez <- as.character(sig_entrez)

ego <- enrichGO(
  gene = sig_entrez,
  OrgDb = org.Hs.eg.db,
  keyType = "ENTREZID",
  ont = "BP",
  readable = TRUE
)

go_plot <- dotplot(ego, showCategory = 10) +
  ggtitle("GO Enrichment")

go_panel <- wrap_elements(full = ggplotGrob(go_plot))

final_figure <- (pca_plot | volcano_plot) /
                (heatmap_panel | go_panel)

final_figure

ggsave("Figure1.pdf", final_figure, width = 14, height = 10)
ggsave("Figure1.png", final_figure, width = 14, height = 10, dpi = 600)


---

# ▶️ How to run it

1. Open RStudio  
2. File → New File → Quarto Document  
3. Paste everything above  
4. Save as:

```text
BreastCancer_GEO.qmd
